About the Doctor

Trained at India's finest — dedicated to your care

Dr. Divya MP is a consultant psychiatrist with over 11 years of clinical experience, trained with a prestigious MD in Psychiatry from AIIMS Rishikesh — one of India's most respected medical institutions.

She has served at Dr RML Hospital and VMMC & Safdarjung Hospital, gaining deep expertise across the full spectrum of psychiatric conditions — from mood disorders and psychosis to addiction, adolescent, and geriatric psychiatry.

Her practice is built on evidence-based medicine, compassionate listening, and individualised care — ensuring that every patient feels heard, safe, and supported on their path to wellness.

MD Psychiatry — AIIMS Rishikesh

Premier national medical institution

Dr RML Hospital, New Delhi

Senior residency & clinical training

VMMC & Safdarjung Hospital

Tertiary psychiatric care experience

How It Works

Your journey to wellness

A structured, compassionate process — from first contact to ongoing support.

1

Consultation

Book via call, WhatsApp, or online — in-clinic or video, whichever suits you best.

2

Assessment

A thorough, confidential evaluation of your history, symptoms, and personal circumstances.

3

Diagnosis & Plan

Clear diagnosis and a personalised treatment plan — medication, psychoeducation, or combined.

4

Follow-Up Care

Regular follow-ups to monitor progress, adjust treatment, and support your long-term wellbeing.

FAQ

Common questions answered

Is my consultation completely confidential? +
As per the Mental Healthcare Act (MHCA), all information shared during your consultation is strictly confidential. No personal or medical data will be disclosed to any third party without your informed written consent. Your privacy is protected by law at Manasya Wellness.
How do I book an appointment? +
You can book by calling directly at +91 9910412203, via WhatsApp on the same number, or through our online booking portal at divya.waitzeros.mrikal.com. Choose in-clinic at Lajpat Nagar or an online video consultation from anywhere in India.
What happens during the first consultation? +
The first consultation involves a detailed evaluation of your history and symptoms — how they started, how they have progressed, and what has brought you to seek help at this point. Based on this thorough assessment, a personalised plan of management will be created tailored to your specific needs and circumstances.
Do you prescribe medicines? +
Yes. As a psychiatrist, Dr. Divya is qualified to prescribe medications where appropriate. The right medication, if needed at all, will be advised depending on the specific condition and individual assessment. Not every patient requires medication — the treatment plan is always personalised to your needs.
How does online consultation work? +
Book your appointment through a direct call, WhatsApp, or our online booking link at divya.waitzeros.mrikal.com. After payment confirmation, the video consultation will be conducted at your scheduled appointment time. You can consult from the privacy and comfort of your home, from anywhere in India.
Can I consult for a family member? +
Yes, you can book on behalf of a family member. However, the person who needs the consultation must be physically present for in-clinic visits, or present during the online consultation. Without the patient being present, no formal medical management or prescription can be provided.
Is addiction treatment available? +
Yes. Dr. Divya provides comprehensive addiction management for a wide range of substance addictions — including alcohol, cannabis, tobacco, opioids — as well as behavioural addictions. Treatment is medically supervised, evidence-based, non-judgmental, and fully personalised to your recovery journey.
What is the difference between a psychiatrist and a psychologist? +
A psychiatrist is a medical doctor (MBBS + MD/DPM) who specialises in mental health. They can diagnose conditions, prescribe medications, and provide psychoeducation and structured management plans. A psychologist holds a degree in psychology and provides therapy and counselling, but is not a medical doctor and cannot prescribe medication. Both play important complementary roles in mental healthcare.

Psychiatric Consultation in South Delhi

Manasya Wellness provides confidential psychiatric consultation in South Delhi and online across India. Dr. Divya MP, an AIIMS-trained psychiatrist with over 11 years of experience, offers treatment for anxiety, depression, bipolar disorder, psychosis, schizophrenia, addiction disorders, sleep disorders, and other mental health conditions. Patients can book in-clinic consultations at Lajpat Nagar, New Delhi, or consult online from anywhere in India.
